column1: structured outline of the Zen/Huayan 52 Bodhisattva Stages (Avataṃsaka Sūtra System), integrating the key names, realizations, and symbolism for each group, based on authoritative sources671011:

column2: 护法心 (Hufa Xin) Protection of Dharma
发心住 (Fāxīn Zhù) Setting the Mind
护法住 (Hùfǎ Zhù) Protection of Dharma
离痴乱行 (Líchīluàn Xíng) Freedom from Delusion
救护一切众生回向 (Jiùhù Yīqiè Zhòngshēng Huíxiàng) Saving All Beings
等一切佛回向 (Děng Yīqiè Fó Huíxiàng) Equal to All Buddhas
至一切处回向 (Zhì Yīqiè Chù Huíxiàng) Reaching All Places
无尽功德藏回向 (Wújìn Gōngdé Cáng Huíxiàng) Infinite Merit
随顺平等善根回向 (Suíshùn Píngděng Shàngēn Huíxiàng) Following Equality
随顺等观回向 (Suíshùn Děngguān Huíxiàng) Equal Contemplation
随顺众生回向 (Suíshùn Zhòngshēng Huíxiàng) Following Beings
真如相回向 (Zhēnrú Xiàng Huíxiàng) Suchness
无缚无著解脱回向 (Wúfù Wúzhuó Jiětuō Huíxiàng) Liberation
难胜地 (Nansheng Di) Difficult to Conquer
